69cf0b9dd7d2715797a83dac description:
Return once more to streets where shadows bite,
Where scavs and raiders clash for rusted gain,
The market calls you back through smoke and night.
69cf0b9dd7d2715797a83dac successMessageT: Old friend, the city streets know you again.
69cf0bfad7d2715797a83daf: Kill PMCs on Streets of Tarkov
69cf0c7c185a5729e3c907bf description:
Four fools who walked my streets now fall,
You dropped them cold before they drew,
Their loot and gear, I'll take it all.
69cf0c7c185a5729e3c907bf successMessageT: Good work, old friend, your cut is due.
